name: foreman
description: The dispatch and verification runtime for AI agent companies

scripts.test: bash tests/smoke/foreman-wrapper-dispatch.sh && bash tests/smoke/issues-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/nobrain-onboarding.sh && bash tests/smoke/press-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/press-invalid-manifest.sh && bash tests/smoke/press-propose-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/lph-cli-smoke.sh && bash tests/smoke/run-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/run-invalid-transitions.sh && python3 tests/json/validate-module-manifests.py modules && python3 tests/json/validate-department-primitives.py modules/departments && python3 tests/json/validate-department-catalog.py && python3 tests/json/validate-company-composition.py
